title: HDFC Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
